title: Sanction decision against Tavira Monaco SAM
text:
The Commission de Contrôle des Activités Financières (Financial Activities Supervisory Commission) pronounced, on February 12, 2026, a sanction against Tavira Monaco SAM.

Sanction decision Tavira Monaco SAM (french version)
